arts.ttl: Team News: Ipswich Town vs. Manchester United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Ipswich Town and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: 'Nkunku's Man Utd threat HEALTHY for Chelsea'
arts.sum: And though the former PSG and RB Leipzig attacker has been in good form, he has barely been given Premier League minutes and would like to join Manchester United in the January transfer window. “If the biggest problem Chelsea have is a couple of player being unhappy and not getting enough game time, then you know the club’s in a healthy position,” Joe Cole told TNT Sports .

arts.ttl: ‘I love that kid’ - Ruben Amorim reveals which Man United star has made ‘important’ first impression
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has not had much time to work with his Manchester United players but says one player in particular has left him excited.

arts.ttl: 'Dreamer' Amorim 'right guy' to revive Man Utd
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim says he is the "right guy at the right time" to turn Manchester United around.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Carlo Ancelotti issues update on club's January plans amid Casemiro speculation
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti says that the club will not make any firm plans for the January window until after their clash with Sevilla on December 22.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's devastated reaction in training speaks volumes about new Man United boss
arts.sum: Mauricio Larriera managed the new Manchester United boss during his playing days and has revealed the fiery side the Portuguese manager possesses

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim is already in danger of repeating Erik ten Hag Man United mistake he must avoid
arts.sum: Manchester United's new head coach Ruben Amorim is in a position of strength now but Erik ten Hag knows it may not last forever

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has already picked his Man Utd favourite - "I love that kid"
arts.sum: Manchester United's new head coach Ruben Amorim has singled out Mason Mount for praise ahead of his first game in charge at Ipswich, noting that the England international suits his 3-4-3 formation

arts.ttl: Chido Obi-Martin scores again in Man United U18s win but another 16-year-old shines to please Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United Under-18s beat Leeds United Under-18s 3-0 on Saturday

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim getting so angry that coaches had to step in sums up new Man Utd boss
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will be hoping to bring some of his fire and determination to Manchester United, who kick off their new era under the Portuguese boss against Ipswich Town this weekend
